description.value: Create invisible wall of force at medium range up to 80 feet long, 20 feet high, 1 foot thick (or hemisphere 10 feet diameter, or sphere 10 feet diameter). Totally blocks physical and magical effects. Can't be dispelled but Disintegrate destroys it. Nothing can pass through.

system.range: Medium, 60 ft. (80 feet long OR hemisphere/sphere 10 feet diameter)
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
